steps.title: Calculate the volume of the cube
steps.content:
The sample is a cube with edge length 0.80 m. Using the volume formula $V = s^3$:
$$V = (0.80)^3 = 0.512 \text{ m}^3$$

steps.title: Calculate the mass
steps.content:
From the density formula Density = Mass / Volume, we rearrange to get:
$$\text{Mass} = \text{Density} \times \text{Volume} = 512 \times 0.512 = 262.144 \text{ kg}$$
To the nearest whole number, this is 262 kg. That confirms A is correct.
